content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Maximum Profit in Job Scheduling". Refer to LeetCode description: N/A
content.inputFormat: The input will contain an array of jobs where each job is an array of three integers: [startTime, endTime, profit].
content.outputFormat: The output will be the maximum possible profit that can be achieved.

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to find the maximum possible profit by scheduling jobs that do not conflict with each other.
solution.timeComplexity: O(n log n) due to sorting
solution.spaceComplexity: O(n) for storing the dynamic programming table
